title: Guns and Zombies
body:
![Banner For Guns and Zombies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69be90cc4d54cc400b041bec7330d8ebcd8e7334.png)

# GET READY TO BATTLE ZOMBIES

Guns and Zombies features lots of zombies and **LOTS** of guns to fight them with! It also features villagers that will fight alongside you (just make sure not to shoot them).

The terrain has also been altered but still follows the vanilla minecraft style of terrian so there aren't any new biomes to worry about, just explore, make guns and fight zombies with them!! 

For an extra challenge try this on Hardcore!!
